name: Greek Cheese Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the feta cheese and add the pot cheese, blending well. Add eggs and beat thoroughly.
2. Melt the butter.
3. Carefully cut the pastry into 3 equal portions. Refrigerate 2/3 of the pastry until needed, covering the rest with a damp towel.
4. Remove one sheet of pastry and place it on a flat surface. Butter it well.
5. Fold the long sides toward the middle, making a strip about 2 inches wide.
6. Place 1 tbsp of cheese mixture in the bottom right-hand corner of the strip and fold over into a triangle shape.
7. Continue folding, ensuring that with each fold, the bottom edge is parallel to the alternate side edge.
8. Lightly butter the finished triangle.
9. Repeat steps 4-8 until all the cheese is used.
10. Bake the triangles in a 425°F (220°C) oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown, turning once. Cool for 5 minutes before serving.
This recipe should provide about 75 pieces, enough for a cocktail party.
